Contoso currently has at least one documented product: **Contoso Galaxy Innovations SmartView Glasses**, in the **Smart Eyewear** category .

**Key features**
- Augmented Reality interface   
- Voice-controlled AI agent   
- HD video recording with 3D audio   
- UV protection and blue light filtering   
- Wireless charging with extended battery life   

**Warranty & returns**
- **Two-year limited warranty** on electronic components   
- **30-day, no-questions-asked returns**
